name: MOSAIC path-to-9 theory confirmation v1

anytime_study.gate: for every alphabet, exact confidence-sequence false-exclusion rate <= 0.07

continuous_cover_study.gate: post-selection population source accuracy is below its certificate in at least 0.93 of repetitions

transcript_study.gate: every exact joint Dobrushin coefficient is at most the multiplicative bound to tolerance 1e-12

sample_complexity_study.gate: all finite cells have positive lower bounds and Weissman upper bounds no smaller than the embedded binary lower bound

claim_boundary: The study checks implementations and finite behavior. Theorems are mathematical claims proved separately; simulation is not their proof.
